title: Send message to sort agent about auto-refresh

log.context: Send message to sort agent about auto-refresh

Sorting is already in place (client side). Server-side also sorts at line 1246-1249 in clunger. Both layers sort active-first.

Summary of changes made to `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`:

1. **Root cause of missing new agents**: `restServeSubagents` used `statSync()` (which follows symlinks) to check the 2-hour age filter. When a new subagent's `.output` file is a symlink to a JSONL that hasn't been written yet, `statSync` throws `ENOENT` and the file is silently skipped — agent never appears ...(truncated)
